message:
✨ feat: provider tree with categories + fullscreen EPG overlay (#11)

- Each provider shows as collapsible section with category groups
- provgroup: filter for provider+group combo
- Fullscreen player shows now-playing and next programme info
- EPG data loaded on channel switch in fullscreen
- Auto-expand provider sections on load

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
